data.title: JIADE LIMITED Announces Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In Chengdu, China, on April 10, 2026, JIADE LIMITED (Nasdaq: JDZG) revealed its financial performance for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025. JIADE is known for offering all-inclusive education support services to adult education institutions in China through its subsidiaries.

data.title: Children's Education Franchise COMPUCHILD Expands Into North Fulton, Georgia, Amid Growing Demand for After-School Enrichment
data.description: A new franchisee of COMPUCHILD will be providing STEM, AI, and entrepreneurship-focused after-school programs for children in Alpharetta and Roswell. The franchise is located in Dublin, Calif. The programs offered by COMPUCHILD are centered around Entrepreneurial STEAM™ and are designed to provide educational opportunities for children outside of regular school hours. The announcement was made on April 10, 2026, by the franchisee.

data.title: ZIEGLER ADVISES ON $10,350,000 REFINANCE
data.description: Ziegler, a specialty investment bank, proudly reveals its position as the primary financial advisor in securing a refinance loan totaling $10,350,000 for a private owner. This successful transaction will assist the Borrower in achieving their financial goals.

data.title: Cango Inc. Filed Its Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: Today, in Dallas on April 10, 2026, Cango Inc. (NYSE: CANG), a notable Bitcoin mining company utilizing its worldwide operations to create a combined energy and AI computing platform, disclosed the submission of its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year.

data.title: Replimune Receives Complete Response Letter from the FDA for RP1 Biologics License Application for the Treatment of Advanced Melanoma
data.description: WOBURN, Mass., April 10, 2026 - Replimune Group, Inc. shared that they got a complete response letter (CRL) from the U.S. FDA concerning their Biologics License Application (BLA) for RP1 along with nivolumab for treating advanced melanoma. The company, listed on NASDAQ as REPL, focuses on innovative oncolytic immunotherapies.

data.title: Western Metallica Announces Director Appointment
data.description: In Toronto, Western Metallica Resources Corp. (TSXV: WMS) has appointed Leanna Jokela to its board of directors. Effective immediately, Ms. Jokela, with over 30 years of experience in accounting and administration, known for offering solid financial advice and efficient processes, joins the board. She has a diverse background across various sectors, emphasizing in government.

data.title: Artemis II lunar flyby mission set to splashdown in the Pacific Ocean on Friday evening, anticipates prediction market users.
data.description: The lunar flyby mission covering a 10-day duration is anticipated to culminate with a splashdown landing in the Pacific Ocean come Friday evening.

data.title: Pelthos Therapeutics Announces CFO Transition
data.description: John M. Gay, who served as the Senior Vice President of Finance & Accounting, has been appointed as the Chief Financial Officer. This decision comes as part of a recent restructuring within the company. Gay will now oversee all financial aspects of the organization. With this transition, the company aims to improve its financial strategies and performance.

data.title: UPDATE -- Aeroméxico Announces Webcast of First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Aeroméxico, a leading airline company, is set to conduct a live conference call and webcast on April 22, 2026, starting at 10:30 a.m. Mexico City Time (12:30 p.m. Eastern Time). The purpose is to delve into their financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. This event is highly anticipated, attracting investors and stakeholders eager to gain insights into Grupo Aeroméxico S.A.B. de C.V. The company's stocks, traded under NYSE: AERO and BMV: AERO, have garnered significant attention. This initiative is crucial for Aeroméxico to transparently communicate its quarterly results efficiently.

data.title: TC Energy to host first quarter 2026 conference call on May 1 and hold annual meeting of common shareholders on May 7
data.description: On April 10, 2026, TC Energy Corporation (TSX, NYSE: TRP) announced plans for a teleconference and webcast on May 1, 2026, to evaluate its first quarter financial performance. Additionally, the Company will convene its 2026 annual meeting of common shareholders on May 7, 2026, in Calgary, Alberta. The discussions will focus on key numbers such as revenue, profits, and strategic outlook for the upcoming year. This quarterly review and annual meeting serve as vital platforms for TC Energy to engage with its stakeholders and provide insights into the Company's operations and future prospects.

data.title: Kinross recommends shareholders reject TRC Capital Investment’s below-market “mini-tender” offer for common shares
data.description: Toronto, on April 10, 2026, Kinross Gold Corporation received notice from TRC Capital Investment Corporation about an unsolicited "mini-tender" offer date April 7, 2026. TRC intends to buy up to 2.5 million common shares of Kinross, equivalent to around 0.21% of its outstanding shares, at a cost of C$41.75 per share. It is important to note that Kinross advises its shareholders to turn down this offer, citing that it is about 4.4% lower than the closing price of C$43.68 per Kinross share on the Toronto Stock Exchange on April 6, 2026.

data.title: Corcept Presents Complete Data from Pivotal ROSELLA Trial in SGO Late-Breaker with Simultaneous Publication in The Lancet: Lifyorli™ (Relacorilant) Plus Nab-Paclitaxel Improves Overall Survival in Patients with Platinum-Resistant Ovarian Cancer
data.description: Corcept Therapeutics Incorporated, a company listed on NASDAQ as CORT and based in Redwood City, California, focuses on developing medications for severe endocrinologic, oncologic, metabolic, and neurologic disorders by affecting cortisol hormone effects. Recently, the company revealed the conclusive overall survival results from its Phase 3 ROSELLA trial. This trial involved the combination of Lifyorli™ (relacorilant) with nab-paclitaxel, a chemotherapeutic drug, in patients resistant to platinum therapy.

data.title: GOLDFISH SWIM SCHOOL'S FIRST FRANCHISE GROUP RECEIVES 2026 MVP AWARD FROM MULTI-UNIT FRANCHISEE MAGAZINE
data.description: Hailing from Troy, Michigan, the BHB Group has established itself as a standout franchisee by successfully operating Goldfish Swim School locations for 17 years. Their leadership in innovation, ability to expand efficiently, and dedication to providing a top-notch experience have not gone unnoticed. In a PRNewswire release on April 10, 2026, BHB Group, known for their commitment to the "Golden Experience," was commended for their achievements. This group's long-standing partnership with Goldfish Swim School Franchising has shown impressive growth and leadership in the industry.

data.title: New web game, like 'Space Invaders', offers Bitcoin rewards. Play to win real Bitcoin if skilled, lucky, or rich.
data.description: A recently launched online game inspired by a popular arcade game is now available for free play. Players have the opportunity to earn actual Bitcoin while engaging in gameplay. However, accumulating Bitcoin rewards will prove challenging.

data.title: Lithium Ionic Provides Update
data.description: On April 10, 2026, Lithium Ionic Corp. (TSXV: LTH; OTCQX: LTHCF; FSE: H3N) acknowledges the Ontario Securities Commission’s report on a regulatory issue related to a different reporting entity and persons connected to Lithium Ionic.
